title: Neutrinos Pass Through You Every Second
script_summary: Discover how trillions of neutrinos pass through your body unnoticed every second.

segments.voiceover: Trillions of neutrinos are streaming through your body right now.
These ghostly particles are so small, they rarely interact with anything.
Neutrinos are born from the sun, cosmic rays, and even nuclear reactions on Earth.
Billions of them pass through every square inch of your body every second—without you even noticing.
Their weak interaction means they can travel through planets like they’re nothing.
Curious to learn more about these mysterious particles? Like and follow for deeper dives into physics!
